meaning: n.头部测量法,头部测量学
examples: Objective to evaluate the accuracy of computerized automatic recognition system of cephalometry.
X-ray cephalometry films were taken before and after treatment, The position of the incisors and sclerous tissues and soft tissues were analyzed.
Objective This article is to find the difference between prominent mandibular Angle female cohort and normal female cohort by three-dimension cephalometry.
